title.name: DEAD MAN'S HAND
scenario_item.card_flip: A spread of face-down cards waits on the table.
scenario_item.hungry_croc: A cheap crocodile toy showing its teeth.
scenario_item.war: A deck rests on the table.
dialogue.opening.1: You were caught with your hand in my till. In my house, that carries one penalty.
dialogue.opening.2: But I am a generous man. Beat my special game and I let you walk. Fail even once... well. You know.
dialogue.intro.card_flip: Match them, or meet your maker.
dialogue.intro.hungry_croc: One tooth saves you. Seven send you under.
dialogue.intro.war: War is simple. Stronger or weaker. Unless it is not.
dialogue.correct.early.1: That is some rare luck. Do not get used to it.
dialogue.correct.mid.2: You are luckier than any man has a right to be.
dialogue.correct.late.1: You have got to be cheating. I just cannot put my finger on it.
dialogue.correct.late.2: No one is this lucky. No one.
dialogue.death.early.2: You should be thankful there is still hope. I am giving you more chances than you deserve.
dialogue.death.mid.2: You are a dead man walking. I give you a chance to live and still you stumble.
dialogue.final.2: No one beats my death game. Not once in thirty years. Not by luck.
dialogue.final.3: I see... you cunning little bastard... you have seen this before. You come from somewhere I cannot follow.
dialogue.final.5: Well then. A deal is a deal.
final.weapon: The shotgun lies between you two.
ending.text:
You blew that monitor head away and walked out of the casino.
But is this really over?
